description_long: This shotgun features a robust, matte-black metal barrel with three prominent barrel bands securing a wooden fore-end. The stock and grip are crafted from a reddish-brown wood with a textured finish, providing both visual appeal and ergonomic support. The receiver and trigger assembly are constructed from dark metal, with a visible trigger guard and a lever mechanism beneath the receiver. The barrel is relatively short and thick, giving the weapon a compact and powerful appearance suitable for close-quarters use. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The shotgun's components are tightly integrated, and the visible screws and fasteners suggest ease of maintenance.
description: A compact, matte-black shotgun with a reddish-brown wooden stock and fore-end, featuring a lever mechanism and robust metal construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, fore-end, and the lever beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the barrel bands, with minimal stock visibility.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock and fore-end, as well as the lever and trigger guard from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel, with the lever and trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short and thick barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
